subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down, and verily it is God's proof amidst His creation and His testimony amongst His servants, and to this the tongue doth bear witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن و انه لبرهان الله بین خلقه و حجته بین عباده و یشهد بذلک لسان
